sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91051" key="prwto/teuktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρωτό-τευκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n91051.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">first-fashioned</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0343.tlg001:172" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ezek.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Exag.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">172</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
